value:
I'm very sorry to hear about this distressing experience on your journey. A one-hour trip without accessible facilities is genuinely frustrating, especially for someone managing a medical condition like diabetes.

To help us look into this properly and see what we can do, could you please share a few details: which train service this was (route and approximate date/time), and your booking reference if you have it? With that information, we can investigate what happened with the facilities and explore what options might be available to you.
